productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Milan White Top
description: Style NoteGet your little one ready for a trip out in this top from Gini and Jony. The print on the front adds to the cool vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps her feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.Product DetailsWhite Top, has a round neck, is sleeveless and has graphic print and sequin detail on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
